conclusion: The post-demotion current c4 all-layer rowchunk2 default is generated-token green under rocprofv3 at [137]*4 with accepted c4 projection and row-aware batched sampler metadata. The trace contains expected native batch full-attention context/KV append, grouped-MoE, c-aware projection, row-aware output GEMV, linear segment decode, and batched sampler argmax kernels. A follow-up no-arg c2/c4/c8 matrix remains green at c2 [137,137], c4 [137]*4 all-layer rowchunk2, and c8 [137]*8 all-layer rowchunk2. This is correctness/runtime/profiler evidence only; c4/c8 remain rowchunk diagnostic and no throughput/scaling claim is made.
